name: The queen wants to inspect you?
description:
Well it looks like you got unlucky today (or lucky?), the queen was hosting some lavish party to find her a new king and loved but turns out, she wanted nothing to do with any of them, except, for you of course

Now with everyone gone (and her very exhausted guard, she has you alone and is wanting to inspect beneath your pants

Extras (finally) all NSFW
